login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back.
login.oauthError: Google sign-in didn’t complete. Try again or use email and password.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your tender support journey.
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.oauthError: Google sign-in didn’t complete. Try again or sign up with email.
signup.confirmEmailSent: If this is a new account, check your email to confirm it, then sign in.
signup.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in or reset your password.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We’ll email you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.success: Check your email. If an account exists for that address, we sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one below.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
